symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic umbilicated dome-shaped papules now acutely inflamed

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Central umbilicated papules at the centre of the erythema are diagnostic of inflamed molluscum.
Warts are hyperkeratotic/cauliflower-like, not smooth umbilicated papules.

symptoms.symptom_name: Localised peri-lesional erythema, afebrile, no spreading induration/pus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Localised erythema without fever/spread/fluctuance argues against true cellulitis/abscess.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Molluscum/BOTE is a clinical diagnosis; no tests needed.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bacterial swab only if true secondary infection develops
